description: Add world-class unique features throughout the app: Enhanced real-time weather widget on all dashboards, a smart notifications/alerts panel for new roles, an interactive facility map component, and a staff wellness tracker. These features make the app stand out as truly world-class.
steps: 1. Create frontend/src/components/WeatherWidget.tsx: A beautiful weather widget showing current conditions and 3-day forecast for the care home location (use simulated data for Salford, UK). Include temperature, humidity, wind, and care-relevant alerts (e.g., 'Cold weather protocol may be needed', 'High UV - residents should wear hats outdoors'). Style with a gradient background matching current conditions.

2. Create frontend/src/components/FacilityMap.tsx: An interactive SVG-based floor plan component showing room statuses (occupied/vacant/needs-cleaning/maintenance-required). Rooms should be clickable and show tooltips with resident name and last-check time. Include a legend. This gives cleaning and maintenance staff a visual overview.

3. Create frontend/src/components/StaffWellnessWidget.tsx: A staff wellbeing panel showing: shift hours worked this week vs contracted, upcoming breaks/rest days, anonymous team mood score (simulated), wellness tips, and a 'Report Concern' button. This demonstrates the app cares about staff welfare.

4. Create frontend/src/components/LiveActivityFeed.tsx: A real-time activity feed component showing recent actions across the care home (notes added, tasks completed, incidents reported, medications administered). Uses simulated data with timestamps. Includes filtering by department. Shows as a ticker/feed with smooth animations.
5. Add the WeatherWidget to ManagerDashboard.tsx in a prominent position (top of the page beside the greeting).
6. Add the FacilityMap to the CleaningDashboard.tsx and MaintenanceDashboard.tsx so those roles can see room statuses visually.
7. Add the StaffWellnessWidget to the CarerDashboard (visible for carer, senior_carer, cleaning, kitchen, maintenance roles).
8. Add the LiveActivityFeed to the ManagerDashboard as a new section showing recent home-wide activity.
acceptance_criteria: frontend/src/components/WeatherWidget.tsx exists and exports a functional component
frontend/src/components/FacilityMap.tsx exists and exports a functional component
frontend/src/components/StaffWellnessWidget.tsx exists and exports a functional component
frontend/src/components/LiveActivityFeed.tsx exists and exports a functional component
ManagerDashboard imports and renders WeatherWidget and LiveActivityFeed
CleaningDashboard and MaintenanceDashboard import and render FacilityMap
Running 'cd frontend && npm run build' succeeds without TypeScript errors
